onboarding.title: Welcome to FamilyHub
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your family. Follow these steps to get started.

family.title: Create Your Family
family.subtitle: Start by setting up your family name and description

avatar.title: Add Family Avatar
avatar.description: Upload a photo to represent your family (optional).

invite.title: Invite Family Members
invite.description: Invite people to join your family (optional - you can add them later).

roles.title: Set Member Roles
roles.description: Customize roles and permissions for each member

complete.title: All Set!
complete.description: Your family is ready. You can now access your family hub and manage members.

invite.pleasewait: Please wait while we add you to the family...
invite.successMessage: You have successfully joined the family. Redirecting you to your family page...
invite.errorMessage: This invitation link is invalid, expired, or has already been used. Please ask the family admin to send you a new invitation.
